metrics.name: Operational Carbon Footprint
metrics.description: Calculated total greenhouse gas emissions of our virtual consultancy office, including travel and server execution.

metrics.name: Client Sustainability Goals Achievement Rate
metrics.description: Percentage of clients that successfully established material ESG metrics and completed initial external reports within 12 months.

metrics.name: Digital Resource Investment
metrics.scope: R&D in Digital Sostenibilidad & Education Hubs
metrics.description: Portion of revenue re-invested directly into open-source research and educational resources for corporate sustainability.

challenges.reality: Our website and tools rely on cloud systems. While hosted on carbon-neutral regions, server loads still draw physical power.
challenges.mitigation_plan: We redesigned this website to Jamstack static assets, reducing page weight from 18MB to under 800KB, which directly saves client CPU cycles and data transfer emissions.

challenges.reality: We guide clients to identify material risks, but we cannot legally force client boards to execute the final mitigation budgets.
challenges.mitigation_plan: We are expanding our training material to include financial fiduciary duty arguments, demonstrating that ignoring material ESG risks violates board legal duties.
